detectors.description:

	- tradingOpen = true (GreenEyedMonster.sol#799)
	GreenEyedMonster.tradingOpen (GreenEyedMonster.sol#363) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GreenEyedMonster.openTrading() (GreenEyedMonster.sol#761-809)

		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (GreenEyedMonster.sol#907)

	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (GreenEyedMonster.sol#717)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (GreenEyedMonster.sol#933)
	GreenEyedMonster._rTotal (GreenEyedMonster.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GreenEyedMonster._getCurrentSupply() (GreenEyedMonster.sol#1075-1085)
	- GreenEyedMonster._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (GreenEyedMonster.sol#931-937)
	- GreenEyedMonster.constructor(address,address) (GreenEyedMonster.sol#389-407)
	- GreenEyedMonster.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (GreenEyedMonster.sol#547-569)
